200.html:
data [required]

object

Vercel configuration data returned by the API.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes of the Datadog Vercel integration configuration.

apiKey [required]

object

Datadog API key reference used by the Vercel integration to send telemetry.

id [required]

string

ID of the Datadog API key used by the Vercel integration.

value [required]

string

Value of the Datadog API key. Returned as an empty string in read responses.

logsConfig [required]

object

Logs forwarding configuration for the Vercel integration.

enabled [required]

boolean

Whether logs forwarding is enabled.

environments [required]

[string]

List of Vercel deployment environments to forward telemetry from.

logSources [required]

[string]

List of Vercel log sources to forward to Datadog.

samplingPercentage [required]

int32

Percentage of logs to forward to Datadog, between 0 and 100.

traceConfig [required]

object

Tracing configuration for the Vercel integration.

enabled [required]

boolean

Whether tracing is enabled.

isDeprecatedOtel [required]

boolean

Whether the configuration uses the deprecated OpenTelemetry tracing setup.

samplingPercentage [required]

int32

Percentage of traces to forward to Datadog, between 0 and 100.

id [required]

string

Vercel configuration ID.

type [required]

enum

Type identifier for a Vercel configuration resource. Allowed enum values: vercelConfiguration

default: vercelConfiguration

400.html:
errors [required]

[object]

A list of errors.

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

string

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.

request.html:
authGrantCode [required]

string

OAuth authorization code received from the Vercel marketplace flow.

vercelConfigurationId [required]

string

Vercel configuration identifier returned by the marketplace flow.
